summary: Iteration 72: Phase 2 IOPA/OPG Upload Feature Tests - 18/18 backend tests PASSED (100%). Verified all requested Phase 2 Post-Surgical Radiograph features: (1) Phase2Submit model accepts iopa_files (list of dicts with filename, original_name, tooth_label) and opg_file (dict with filename, original_name), (2) POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2 stores iopa_files and opg_file in phase2_data, (3) GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves files referenced in phase2_data.iopa_files and phase2_data.opg_file with proper access control, (4) POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp works for IOPA/OPG image uploads (jpg, png), (5) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns phase2_data with iopa_files and opg_file after Phase 2 submission.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing not requested for this iteration. Code review shows frontend implementation exists in submit-phase2/[id].tsx and [id].tsx as per files_of_reference.

critical_code_review_comments: Phase2Submit model correctly defines iopa_files (Optional[List[Dict[str, str]]]) and opg_file (Optional[Dict[str, str]]) at lines 346-347
submit_phase2 endpoint correctly stores iopa_files and opg_file in phase2_data at lines 3041-3042
serve_upload endpoint correctly queries phase2_data.iopa_files.filename and phase2_data.opg_file.filename for access control at lines 1346-1347
File upload endpoint /api/uploads/cbct-temp is reused for IOPA/OPG uploads (accepts jpg, png, pdf, heif, heic)
Access control properly enforces that only student owner, assigned supervisor, and incharge/admin can access uploaded files
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup their own test procedures using unique slots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 IOPA/OPG upload feature fully tested in iteration 72. All backend endpoints working correctly. Key endpoints: POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp (temp upload for IOPA/OPG images), POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2 (with iopa_files and opg_file in body), GET /api/procedures/{id} (returns phase2_data with iopa_files and opg_file), GET /api/uploads/{filename} (file serving with role-based access control for phase2_data files). Tests clean up after themselves. The approval workflow is: 1) Create procedure (draft), 2) POST /request-phase1-approval (pending_phase1), 3) Supervisor POST /approve, 4) Incharge POST /approve (phase1_approved), 5) POST /submit-phase2.

feature_1_cbct_temp_upload_for_iopa.result: PASS - JPG and PNG uploads work via /api/uploads/cbct-temp

feature_2_phase2_submit_accepts_iopa_fil.result: PASS - Phase2Submit model accepts iopa_files and stores in phase2_data

feature_3_phase2_submit_accepts_opg_file.result: PASS - Phase2Submit model accepts opg_file and stores in phase2_data

feature_4_get_procedure_returns_iopa_opg.result: PASS - GET /api/procedures/{id} returns phase2_data with iopa_files and opg_file

feature_5_serve_upload_finds_iopa_opg.result: PASS - serve_upload endpoint finds files in phase2_data.iopa_files and phase2_data.opg_file

feature_6_access_control.result: PASS - Supervisor and incharge can access IOPA files for their procedures

feature_7_multiple_iopa_files.result: PASS - Multiple IOPA files can be stored (3 for Multiple Conventional, 4 for All on 4, 6 for All on 6)

feature_8_optional_fields.result: PASS - iopa_files and opg_file are optional fields

tested_endpoints.POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp: 200 - Returns cbct_file, cbct_original_name, cbct_content_type for IOPA/OPG uploads
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2: 200 - Accepts iopa_files and opg_file in body, stores in phase2_data
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}: 200 - Returns procedure with phase2_data containing iopa_files and opg_file
tested_endpoints.GET /api/uploads/{filename}: 200 for authorized users (student owner, supervisor, incharge) accessing IOPA/OPG files
